notes: I didn't test for long but managed to get it working by going into the games files and changing config.txt to have fullscreen=false, I also made Vsync=true but that probably isn't necessary.  I also disabled Esync seeing as others have said to do so.  I did all this to get it working only to learn that the servers were shutdown about a year ago, oh well.
title: Ace of Spades: Battle Builder
